name: Colleen Table Lamp (Set of 2) - 31 Inch Height - LIT4277 - White Marble - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Colleen table lamp. Featuring a sleek marble design, this lamp is a beautiful addition to any room. The natural elegance of marble brings a touch of understated sophistication to your decor. Its classic color complements a variety of interior styles, making it a versatile choice for both modern and traditional settings. Whether placed on an end table in the living room or a nightstand in the bedroom, the Colleen table lamp enhances your space with its simple charm and timeless appeal. Discover how this piece, crafted from quality materials, can transform the ambiance of your favorite room.
